name_en: Large [Overseas Original Exclusive Real Shot M41180 Large 40990]
name_cn:
Large [Overseas Original Exclusive Real Shot M41180 Large 40990]
🎀🎀Classic Shopping Bag💋💋Louis Vuitton New Neverfull, a fresh take on a classic handbag. Explore the exquisite details inside. The redesigned interior features a fresh fabric lining and vintage details inspired by the Louis Vuitton archives. The most notable feature is the detachable zip pouch, which can be used as a chic clutch on its own or as an extra pocket. The bright lining tone adds more vibrancy to the classic Monogram canvas.
Medium Size: (32*29*17)
Large Size: (40*33*20)
